en.Upton Scudamore, Wiltshire, England, Uni: Upton Scudamore, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom

nameMeanings.name: Scudamore
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Skidmore
meanings: English (Staffordshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Scudamore, which most probably arises from a Norman French nickname for a knight who used a particular type of leather shield, from the unrecorded Norman French phrase, escu de more ‘Moor's shield’, a reference to a type of Moorish leather shield called an adarga, which was in widespread use not only in medieval Iberia and north Africa but also in Brittany.

History: The manor of Upton Scudamore in Wiltshire was held by Peter de Skydemore in 1216. The same manor was held by Godfrey Escudamore shortly after 1150. The Scudamore family claim descent from Ralph, recorded in Domesday Book (1086) as holder of Opeton (Upton), whose son was known as Reginald Escudemor.

nameMeanings.name: Godfrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Old French name Godefroy, which is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from god ‘god’ (or gōd ‘good’) + fred, frid ‘peace’. This was adopted by the Normans, and brought to England by immigrants from the Low Countries and France. It was borne by a Norman saint ( c.1066–1115 ) who became bishop of Amiens. There has been considerable confusion with Geoffrey .

en.lifeSummary: When Godfrey Scudamore was born in 1197, in Abbey Dore, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Walter Scudamore, was 24 and his mother, Sybil, was -7. He had at least 5 sons with Maud Giffard. He died in 1266, at the age of 69.

ko.lifeSummary: Godfrey Scudamore(이)가 1197년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 애브브이 도어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter Scudamore(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Sybil(은)는 -7세였다. 그는 Maud Giffard(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1266년 69세의 나이로 사망했다.
